name: Srajan Gupta
bio: Electronics and Communication Engineering student at Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Vellore, with hands-on experience in FPGA, Verilog HDL, Embedded Systems, Digital Electronics, and AI-driven solutions. Passionate about designing innovative hardware and software systems, with a strong interest in Embedded Systems, FPGA Design, Artificial Intelligence, and Software Development. Actively seeking internship, research, and software engineering opportunities to apply technical skills, solve real-world problems, and contribute to impactful projects.
